Frontier-orbital gap (HOMO–LUMO) of water — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, RI density-fitted) in PySCF  (gas phase), charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz` (no re-optimization; single-point only). SCF converged in 7 cycles.

Result (Koopmans orbital energies):
  HOMO  = –8.6037183 eV
  LUMO  =  0.33695037 eV
  HOMO–LUMO gap = 8.9406687 eV

Warnings: none reported by the engine.

Live log & reproducibility: the run was launched via
  /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --tier standard /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpvhd0bd3t/live.json
and streamed to a timestamped `.out` file in the current working directory (available for inspection). The JSON results are stored at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpvhd0bd3t/live.json`.

The value reported above is the exact headline `homo_lumo_gap_eV` returned by chemkit’s `frontier-orbitals` skill; provenance: computed.
